briefs.title: Council to vote on final approval of purpose-built rental townhouse rezoning in Burnaby
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on the final adoption of a rezoning bylaw that would allow Mosaic Avenue Developments to build a purpose-built rental townhouse project at several addresses on Bevan Street and Marine Drive in the Edmonds area.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision — this rezoning could affect nearby property owners and the local rental housing supply.

key_dates.label: Burnaby rezoning bylaw 14590 final adoption vote — council meeting
